# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# Variables
variables:
  instanceType:
    type: string
    description: Instance type (valid values are 'n1-standard-2' and 'n1-standard-8')
resources:
   - name: cloud-vpc
     type: compute.v1beta2.network
     properties:
       autoCreateSubnetworks: true
       description: Our VPC to host our subnets for each tier
       name: ${VAR_PROJECT_NAME}
       networkIp: 10.48.0.0/9
       routingConfig:
         routerLevelRoutingConfig:
           defaultExternalIpAddressConfiguration:
             ipVersion: IPV4
